headline: CTERA Named a 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Strong Performer for Hybrid Cloud Storage
summary: New York, NY, March 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CTERA, a leader in intelligent data management, today announced it has been named a Strong Performer in the 2025 Gartner Peer Insights “Voice of the Customer” for Hybrid Cloud Storage. This distinction is based entirely on feedback and ratings from end-user professionals with experience purchasing, implementing, and/or using the product or service.
